description: Set type is a component that is part of the undo system. This stores an undo step for setting a type field.

fields.Target: The value field for a type value that was changed.
fields.ValueBefore: The value it was before edit.
fields.ValueAfter: The value it became after edit.
fields._performed: Whether this was done (true) or can be redone (false)
fields._description: The description of this undo step for changing a type field.
